description_long: This is a visually striking sports car with a vibrant orange body adorned with playful graphics, including a stylized fish on the roof and whimsical patterns on the hood and sides. The car features a low, aerodynamic profile with a wide stance, sleek curves, and a prominent front grille. Its windows are tinted black, and the wheels are large with black rims and gold accents, giving it a bold, modern look. The sides display the word 'vroom' and meme-style faces, adding a humorous and unique touch. The rear of the car includes a detailed bumper and a yellow-and-black checkered pattern, suggesting a racing influence. The overall design is both sporty and expressive, making it stand out in any urban environment.
description: A vibrant orange sports car with playful graphics, black-and-gold wheels, and a low, aerodynamic profile. Distinctive meme-style art and racing-inspired details make it visually unique.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide grille, stylized hood graphics, and the fish graphic on the roof.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the 'vroom' text, meme face, tinted windows, and black-and-gold wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the checkered yellow-and-black pattern, detailed bumper, and dual exhausts.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with 'vroom' text, meme face, and visible wheel design.
attribute_wheel_design: five-spoke black rims with gold accents
